---
name: Improvement from Testing
about: Report an improvement discovered while testing the plugin on a real project
title: "[Improve] "
labels: improvement, testing-feedback
assignees: ''
---

## Project Context

What type of site were you building? (e.g., consulting firm, e-commerce, portfolio)

## What Happened

Describe what the plugin did.

## What Should Have Happened

Describe the ideal behavior.

## Suggested Fix

How could this be improved? (Be specific if you can.)

## Affected Command / Agent

Which command or agent needs the change? (e.g., `/wp-section`, `wp-template` agent, `wp-css` agent)

## Impact on Workflow

How much did this affect your work?

- [ ] **Blocker** — Had to stop and work around it manually
- [ ] **Annoying** — Slowed me down but I could continue
- [ ] **Nice to have** — Minor improvement, not urgent
